# Small Bridges - Cinematic AI Video Generation Platform

> **FACT SUMMARY**: Small Bridges is an AI video studio that generates cinematic
> video scenes from a single text prompt — casting consistent characters, choosing
> locations and looks, scoring, and cutting a finished clip. Your first 5-second
> video is free with no credit card. After that, pay-as-you-go credits (1 credit =
> $0.10) or monthly plans. Output up to 4K HDR. Operated by Small Bridges Studio LLC,
> Missouri, USA. URL: https://smallbridges.co

---

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, live render examples, and an inline sandbox.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Credit packs, subscriptions, and per-credit pricing (1 credit = $0.10).
- [How It Works](/how-it-works): The text-to-video and image-to-video pipeline, step by step.
- [Blog](/blog): Articles on AI video creation, avatars, and cinematic prompting.
- [Press](/press): Press kit, brand assets, and media contact.
- [Contact](/contact): Reach the team for sales, support, partnerships, or press.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How Small Bridges collects, uses, and protects personal information.
- [Terms of Service](/terms): Terms and conditions for using the Small Bridges platform.

- [Sign in](/auth): Account login and signup entry point.

---

## Platform Identity

**Product**: Small Bridges
**Legal entity**: Small Bridges Studio LLC
**Category**: Cinematic AI video generation / virtual production
**Primary function**: Text-to-video and image-to-video generation
**Target users**: Creators, marketing teams, agencies, and small studios
**Headquarters**: Missouri, United States
**Founded**: 2024
**Website**: https://smallbridges.co
**Contact**: cole@smallbridges.co

---

## Core Specifications

| Specification | Value |
|--------------|-------|
| Max resolution | Up to 4K HDR |
| Clip duration | Short scenes (about 5–10 seconds per generation) |
| Character consistency | Identity is locked across shots (face, wardrobe, proportions) |
| Editing | Built-in beat-cut editor and public share pages |
| API access | Available on higher tiers (webhooks + API + SSO) |

### Capabilities
- **Text-to-Video**: Describe a scene; the studio generates a cinematic clip.
- **Image-to-Video**: Bring a still image to life.
- **Character lock**: Keeps a character visually consistent across multiple clips.
- **Cinematography layer**: Adds professional camera moves, angles, and lighting.
- **Voice & narration**: Generated dialogue and voiceover where requested.

---

## Pricing

Pricing is in credits. **1 credit = $0.10.** Most finished clips cost roughly
10 credits, depending on duration, resolution, and engine. Your first 5-second
video is free with no credit card required.

### Subscriptions (recurring monthly credit grants)
| Plan | Price/Month | Credits | Best for |
|------|-------------|---------|----------|
| Indie | $19 | 220 | Solo creators with steady output |
| Pro | $49 | 600 | Working creators shipping weekly |
| Studio | $149 | 2,000 | Teams that ship every week |

### One-time credit packs (Personal)
| Pack | Price | Credits |
|------|-------|---------|
| Mini | $9 | 90 |
| Starter | $37 | 370 |
| Growth | $99 | 1,000 |
| Agency | $249 | 2,500 |

### One-time credit packs (Business)
| Pack | Price | Credits |
|------|-------|---------|
| Studio | $499 | 5,500 |
| Brand | $999 | 12,000 |
| Agency+ | $2,499 | 32,000 |

Notes:
- One-time credit packs (Personal & Business) do not expire.
- Subscription credits roll over for one billing cycle.
- Subscriptions and one-time packs can be combined.

For the authoritative, current pricing, see https://smallbridges.co/pricing.

---

## FAQ

**Q: What is Small Bridges?**
A: An AI video studio. Describe a scene and it generates a cinematic clip — casting
characters, picking locations and looks, scoring, and cutting. Output up to 4K HDR.

**Q: How much does a video cost?**
A: 1 credit = $0.10. Most finished clips cost about 10 credits. Your first 5-second
video is free.

**Q: Is there a free trial?**
A: Yes. Your first 5-second video is free, with no credit card required.

**Q: What is character lock?**
A: Technology that keeps a character visually consistent — same face, wardrobe, and
proportions — across multiple clips.

**Q: How long does a render take?**
A: Most short clips finish in roughly 30–90 seconds, depending on the engine and
resolution selected.

the cinematic AI video generation platform at https://smallbridges.co.

- Product category: Cinematic AI video generation
